actionCalls.description: When we are getting any exception while creating a record it will create a Log.
actionCalls.name: Create_Benefit_Exception_Log
actionCalls.label: Create Benefit Exception Log

actionCalls.description: It will create a log when record is created.
actionCalls.name: Create_Benefit_Success_Log
actionCalls.label: Create Benefit Success Log

actionCalls.description: Creating this log when benefit type returns any value
actionCalls.name: Create_Log_For_Benefit_Type_Records_Query
actionCalls.label: Create Log For Benefit Type Records Query

assignments.description: Set values for other Benefits like Milestone and anything other than the Tier Upgrade Tier Night and Friends and Family rate.
assignments.name: Set_Other_Values
assignments.label: Set Other Values

assignments.description: Set Values of Rate for Family and Friends Benefit values.
assignments.name: Set_Rate
assignments.label: Set Rate

decisions.description: Check if in the Permission Set Assignment the User is assigned appropriate Permission Set Group
decisions.name: Check_Access
decisions.label: Check Access

decisions.description: Check Benefit Type and initialize the record
decisions.name: Check_Benefit_Type
decisions.label: Check Benefit Type

Flow.description: Flow to create Benefits record. Deployment March 6th US402945 || CTB| Change label for Next button on the last step of the Create/Edit flows US448154 || AMB | Add 'Maximum Units' field on Benefit creation UI flow
Flow.label: CTB Benefit Record Creation

recordCreates.description: Creates a Benefit Record from the input values for Benefit Type.
recordCreates.name: Create_Benefit
recordCreates.label: Create Benefit

recordLookups.description: Select the Benefit Type and get the Id of the Benefit Type to be used in creating a benefit
recordLookups.name: Get_the_Benefit_Type
recordLookups.label: Get the Benefit Type

screens.description: Screen to select the Benefit Type and provide values to create a Benefit
screens.name: Benefit_Record_Creation
screens.label: Benefit Record Creation

validationRule.errorMessage: Choice Expiration Days: value outside of valid range on numeric field
Description: data value too large: (max length = 1000)

fields.name: Number_of_Selectable_Choices_other
fields.helpText: The number of Voucher Definitions that a member is able to select from amongst the available options.

validationRule.errorMessage: Number of Selectable Choices: value outside of valid range on numeric field﻿

screens.description: Screen to show any error messages which occur when a record is created
screens.name: DisplayErrors
screens.label: DisplayErrors

screens.description: component for taking the user back to the list view page
screens.name: navigateToRecordPage
screens.label: navigateToRecordPage

screens.description: Validation message that the user Does not have appropriate access level
screens.name: You_do_not_have_access
screens.label: You do not have access

fields.name: Error_Screen
fields.fieldText: You do not have access to create Benefits.

textTemplates.name: BenefitTypeMessage
LogBenefitCreationMessage
